description: Likely extracts or classifies a compact property of the input rather than reproducing the whole canvas. Removes input color(s) [0, 1, 3, 5]; output colors are a subset of input colors. Primary structural cue: compact output. Inferred transformation family: extract/count/select. The rule is uncertain and needs task-specific review.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_de1cd16c(I):
    x1 = leastcolor(I)
    x2 = objects(I, T, F, F)
    x3 = sizefilter(x2, ONE)
    x4 = difference(x2, x3)
    x5 = rbind(subgrid, I)
    x6 = apply(x5, x4)
    x7 = rbind(colorcount, x1)
    x8 = argmax(x6, x7)
    x9 = mostcolor(x8)
    O = canvas(x9, UNITY)
    return O
